title: Associate Information Security Analyst
description: Entry-level information security role for recent graduates or candidates with limited experience. Monitor alerts, investigate potential threats, support incident response, and work with SIEM and vulnerability assessment tools.

title: SOC Engineer - L2
description: Developing information security analyst. Monitor SIEM alerts and events, investigate threats, support incident response, vulnerability assessments, NIST controls, firewalls, and intrusion detection systems.

title: SOC Engineer - L2
description: Developing cybersecurity role supporting security monitoring, SIEM investigations, incident response, vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, and security controls. The analyst monitors alerts from multiple sources, investigates potential threats, documents findings, escalates incidents, and assists with remediation. The role maintains SIEM and endpoint security tooling, applies NIST practices, reviews network and Linux telemetry, and collaborates with the incident response team.

title: SOC Engineer - L2
description: SOC analyst role monitoring alerts, escalating threats, supporting incident response, maintaining SIEM systems, and applying NIST security practices. Responsibilities include reviewing security events, investigating suspicious activity, supporting vulnerability assessments, documenting incidents, and improving detection content. The developing analyst works with Linux and network logs, endpoint controls, firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and the broader incident response team.

title: Managed Services Information Security Analyst
description: A seasoned subject matter expert requiring seasoned experience in SOC operations, SIEM investigations, threat hunting, malware analysis, incident response, and client security delivery.

title: Senior Information Security Analyst
description: Senior analyst leading SIEM investigations, threat hunting, and security incident response.

title: Principal Information Security Specialist, Threat Intelligence
description: Principal threat intelligence specialist leading investigations, threat hunting, malware analysis, and incident response strategy.

title: Security Engineer
description: Security engineering, detection, SIEM, and incident response.

title: Social Media Manager
description: Manage social campaigns, community engagement, and social media security settings.

title: Security Guard
description: Protect the premises, inspect access badges, and perform physical patrols.
